# SVG Canvas Test

```yaml
type: svg-canvas
viewBox: "0 0 800 600"
interactive: true
elements:
  - type: rect
    x: 10
    y: 10
    width: 100
    height: 60
    class: "node-primary"
  - type: circle
    cx: 200
    cy: 200
    r: 50
    class: "node-secondary"
  - type: text
    x: 10
    y: 10
    text: "Hello SVG"
```
